relationships.context: Script queries CRM files to match stakeholders to meetings via meeting ID or CRM slug
Script can access Kondo data as part of stakeholder intel consolidation
Script can access LinkedIn data as part of stakeholder intel consolidation
Script can access Aviato data as part of stakeholder intel consolidation
Script is housed within the N5 scripts directory as part of V's operational infrastructure
